final:
module mux2to1 (
    input sel,
    input [3:0] in0,
    input [3:0] in1,
    output reg [3:0] out);
    
    always @(*) begin
        if (sel) begin
            out = in1;
        end else begin
            out = in0;
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out <= ~in0 & ~in1;
    end
  end

endmodule
